svg.text: 7 active lines | shared upstream block -> line feed -> Glass2 modules -> output collection
Y = 28 to 32 | 7 Warp Cells S buffers -> 2 TU Warp Cells -> central hub
Y = 18 to 26 | 7 identical modules, each = 1 Support + 10 Glass2 in a 5 x 2 grid
Y = 12 to 16 | each line root = TU AM Core + TU QA Unit + WCell Support XS
Y = 0 to 10 | smelters, Electronics2 bank, Adv AM Core S x5, Adv QA Unit S x5
